content:
✔ Class Can “Reverse” the Effect With a Collective Skill Check:
• If enough students pass the skill check, they can lessen or remove the impact.
• If they fail, the effect remains.

✔ Why This Works:
✔ Ensures everyone is invested in attendance, even if they’re not absent.
✔ Creates risk and unpredictability.
✔ Adds an extra layer of class-wide strategy.

📜 2. Running from Skill Checks – A New Tactical Option

📜 Players can attempt to “run away” from any challenge—but there’s a roll involved.

✔ How It Works:
• Players must declare they are attempting to flee before rolling.
• A roll of 7+ allows escape with no penalty.
• A roll of 4-6 inflicts a minor debuff for running.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 456 (chunk 456/555)
